description.zh: 朝敌人发射高速水弹。
description.en: Hurls a high speed ball of water at an enemy.

description.zh: 发射水弹 笔直飞向对方。
description.en: Hurls a ball of water straight at an enemy.

description.zh: 发射大量泡沫 并缓慢追击敌人。
description.en: Fires numerous bubbles that slowly pursue an enemy.

description.zh: 生成酸性云朵 在敌人头上下酸雨。
description.en: Creates acidic clouds that pour down acid rain on enemies.

description.zh: 在头上生成巨大水球 瞄准敌人并发射。
description.en: Creates a giant ball of water and hurls it at an enemy.

description.zh: 猛烈地释放出水流 并向前方大范围横扫。
description.en: Shoots pressurized water at extreme velocities, sweeping over a wide area in front of it.

description.zh: 以急速射出空气团块。
description.en: Quickly fires a burst of highly pressurized air.

description.zh: 皮皮鸡的专用技能。 瞄准并飞扑向敌人后，用尖喙突袭敌人。
description.en: Chikipi's exclusive skill. Flies at enemies in its sights, attacking them with its sharp beak.

description.zh: 积蓄能量， 并将其化作子弹射出。
description.en: Charges energy into a focused blast.

description.zh: SheepBall的专用技能。 咕噜咕噜地滚动并追击敌人。 攻击后会因晕眩而无法动弹。
description.en: SheepBall's exclusive skill. Curls into a ball, rolling after any enemies in its way. Becomes dizzy and unable to move after the attack ends.

description.zh: 捣蛋猫的专用技能。 挥舞双臂追击敌人， 连续挥出利拳。
description.en: Cattiva's exclusive skill. Chases after enemies, swinging both arms and delivering a flurry of punches.

description.zh: 美露帕的专用技能。 散发出可爱的气场并朝向前方冲刺。
description.en: Melpaca's exclusive skill. Charges forward while surrounded by an adorable aura.

description.zh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。
description.en: Swiftly leaps at an enemy and bites into them.

description.zh: 紫霞鹿及亚种的专用技能。 面向敌人冲刺，扬起尖角攻击敌人。 如在骑乘时发动，可操控前进方向。
description.en: Eikthyrdeer's exclusive skill. Charges at foes and uses antlers to launch them into the air. When used while riding, the direction of the charge can be controlled.

description.zh: 草莽猪的专用技能。 瞄准敌人后，猛烈地冲向敌人。
description.en: Rushoar's exclusive skill. Takes aim at a foe and rushes at them with a fierce charge.

description.zh: 天擒鸟的专用技能。 向前伸出脚爪， 以滑翔的姿态猛力冲向目标。
description.en: Galeclaw's exclusive skill. With talons outstretched, it glides forward in a ferocious charge.

description.zh: 笑魇猫的专用技能。 带着无所畏惧的笑容跳起， 再用全身的力量辗压敌人。
description.en: Grintale's exclusive skill. Grins menacingly before leaping into the air and smashing foes with its body.

description.zh: 疾风隼的专用技能。 在前方制造出龙卷风后， 以滑翔的姿态冲向敌人。
description.en: Nitewing's exclusive skill. Generates a tornado ahead before soaring towards its target.

description.zh: 积蓄大量能量， 并将其化作巨大球体射出。
description.en: Charges a massive amount of energy before firing a large destructive ball.

description.zh: 连理龙及亚种的专用技能。 侧身站立， 然后向前猛撞敌人，并将其击飞。
description.en: Broncherry's exclusive skill. Turns sideways before tackling enemies in front of it, sending them flying into the air.

description.zh: 铁拳猿及亚种的专用技能。 猛击地面两次后高高跳起， 再赏给对方强力的一拳。
description.en: Gorirat's exclusive skill. Pounds the ground twice before leaping into the air and delivers a powerful punch.

description.zh: 云海鹿的专用技能。 操控大气，借助风压向前猛冲。
description.en: Fenglope's exclusive skill. Charges forward while manipulating the atmosphere to create a pressurized wind tunnel around itself.

description.zh: 君王美露帕及亚种的专用技能。 向上高高跳起后， 用丰满的庞大身躯辗压敌人。
description.en: Kingpaca's exclusive skill. Leaps high into the air before smashing into an enemy with its chubby, massive body.

description.zh: 圣光骑士的专用技能。 让神圣的力量覆满自身， 并以左手持长枪向前冲锋。 右手的盾牌在冲锋时能挡下所有攻击。
description.en: Paladius' exclusive skill. Charges forward while enveloped in holy power with its spear thrust ahead. The shield in its other hand blocks all attacks during the charge.

description.zh: 积蓄破坏性的能量， 朝前方大范围射出威力惊人的光束。
description.en: Charges destructive energy before firing a high-powered beam forward across a wide area.

description.zh: 赌上性命引发爆炸。 使用后会陷入无法战斗的状态。
description.en: Risks its life to cause a violent explosion. Becomes incapacitated afterwards.

description.zh: 赌上性命引发爆炸。 是种为了荣誉而牺牲自己的技能。
description.en: Risks its life to cause a violent explosion, but receives the honor of falling in battle.

description.zh: 赌上性命引发大爆炸。 使用后便会化作夜空中闪耀的明星。
description.en: Risks life to cause a massive explosion. Those who perish for their duty become glistening stars in the night sky.

description.zh: 发射超高速风刃 瞄准后笔直飞向敌人。
description.en: Fires a high speed blade of wind that flies straight at an enemy.

description.zh: 释放大量坚硬的种子 攻击前方的敌人。
description.en: Fires a volley of hard seeds at enemies in front of it.

description.zh: 花冠龙及亚种的专用技能。 使用巨大的尾巴拍打前方地面， 对直线范围造成冲击。
description.en: Dinossom's exclusive skill. Uses its large tail to strike the ground in front of it, delivering a shockwave in a straight line.

description.zh: 瞄准敌人发射 3发直线飞行的超高速风刃。
description.en: The user fires three high-speed blades of wind in quick succession that fly straight at enemies.

description.zh: 发射危险的种子。 碰到敌人会绽开并爆炸。
description.en: Launches a deadly seed. If it hits an enemy, the seed explodes.

description.zh: 羽箭射手及亚种的专用技能。 拉满弓弦全神贯注瞄准敌人后， 对敌人进行射击。
description.en: Robinquill's exclusive skill. Takes aim while drawing its bow before releasing a powerful shot at an enemy.

description.zh: 女皇蜂的专用技能。 以法杖聚集力量后，再旋转法杖来释放能量。
description.en: Elizabee's exclusive skill. Channels power into its staff, and unleashes it in a whirl.

description.zh: 在左右两侧生成龙卷风， 并扇向敌人。
description.en: Generates two tornadoes on either side before launching them at an enemy.

description.zh: 叶胖达的专用技能。 不停转动右臂，向前方猛力出拳攻击。
description.en: Mossanda's exclusive skill. Winds up its right arm before striking an enemy with a devastating punch.

description.zh: 用地下尖锐的根部追击敌人 并从脚下贯穿敌人。
description.en: Generates spiny thorns that chase an enemy along the ground, piercing them from below.

description.zh: 积蓄太阳之力 瞄准敌人发射强劲光线。
description.en: Charges solar energy before blasting enemies with a powerful beam.

description.zh: 在上空生成尖锐的冰柱 瞄准敌人后发射冰柱。
description.en: Creates ice lances in the air that fly towards enemies.

description.zh: 制造出新月型的冰刃， 将之射向前方。
description.en: Creates a crescent blade of ice and hurls it forward.

description.zh: 严冬鹿的专用技能。 向前冲刺并以雄伟的冰角刺穿敌人。
description.en: Reindrix's exclusive skill. Charges at an enemy with antlers adorned in ice.

description.zh: 在敌人的脚边 生成尖锐的冰刃。
description.en: Summons a sharp ice lance under an enemy.

description.zh: 企丸王的专用技能。 全身散发寒气，并采用腹部着地之姿滑行， 往敌人的方向用力撞去。
description.en: Penking's exclusive skill. Lies on its belly while generating frozen air all around it before sliding at enemies at high speed.

description.zh: 朝敌人喷出冰冷空气， 持续对目标造成伤害。
description.en: Enshrouds an enemy in a frigid blast of air, dealing continuous damage.

description.zh: 寒霜兽的专用技能。 举起前脚猛击地面， 使冰雪于敌人所在处喷发。 喷发时四周更会有雪球倾泻而下。
description.en: Reptyro Cryst's exclusive skill. Raises its front legs and slams them into the ground, causing a frozen blast under its enemies. It simultaneously bombards them with snow balls from above.

description.zh: 唤冬兽及亚种的专用技能。 凝结冷空气，让翅膀覆上冰晶， 并在全力奔跑的同时以冰翼撕裂敌人。
description.en: Frostallion's exclusive skill. Dashes forward while concentrating frigid air around its wings, using them to slash enemies with icy blade.

description.zh: 生成巨大的冰块 瞄准敌人后高速发射。 中弹时，可同时给周围造成冲击。
description.en: Creates a giant lump of ice and hurls it at an enemy. It deals damage to those in the surrounding area upon impact.

description.zh: 瞄准后发射可笔直飞向敌人 的火焰弹。
description.en: Hurls a ball of fire straight at an enemy.

description.zh: 向敌人发射火球。 稍作飞行后会破裂 并向前方放射小型火球。
description.en: Shoots fireballs towards an enemy. The fireballs explode after a short distance, generating smaller fireballs that spread forward.

description.zh: 炽焰牛的专用技能。 锁定敌人后， 以凶猛气势顶着锐利牛角冲向对方。
description.en: Arsox's exclusive skill. Takes aim and charges with fierce momentum while raising its horn.

description.zh: 连续发射3支高速火箭 并追击敌人。
description.en: Fires three flaming arrows in succession that home in on an enemy.

description.zh: 浪刃武士及亚种的专用技能。 摆出迎战姿势后瞬间移动至敌人面前， 并使出超高速的拔刀攻击。
description.en: Bushi's exclusive skill. Taking hold of the sword, it appears in front of an enemy in an instant and unleashes an ultra-fast sword draw attack.

description.zh: 面向敌人释放火焰， 持续对目标造成伤害。
description.en: Shoots flames at an enemy, dealing continuous damage.

description.zh: 炎魔羊及亚种的专用技能。 接近目标后跳起同时以左手爪子向上挥击， 再用右手爪子迅速向下挥砍。
description.en: Incineram's exclusive skill. Draws near enemies using its left claw to slash them into the air before cutting them down with its right claw.

description.zh: 苍焰狼的专用技能。 带着缠绕全身的青蓝火焰，气势汹汹地向前猛冲。
description.en: Kitsun's exclusive skill. Charges forward with great speed while enveloped in intense blue flames.

description.zh: 在左右两侧生成炙热的龙卷风， 并扇向敌人。
description.en: Generates two flaming tornadoes on either side before launching them at an enemy.

description.zh: 火麒麟的专用技能。 带着缠绕全身的火焰向前猛冲。 途经之处均会留下滚滚火焰。
description.en: Pyrin's exclusive skill. Charges forward while engulfed in a veil of flames. Flames continue to burn in its path.

description.zh: 熔岩兽的专用技能。 举起前脚猛击地面， 使岩浆于敌人所在处喷发。 喷发时四周更会有火山弹倾泻而下。
description.en: Reptyro's exclusive skill. Raises its front legs and slams them into the ground, causing a volcanic eruptions under its enemies. It simultaneously bombards them with volcanic bombs from above.

description.zh: 使敌人周围地面活性化， 并在一定时间后爆炸。
description.en: Infuses the surrounding ground with energy, causing it to explode after a set amount of time.

description.zh: 荷鲁斯的专用技能。 扇起炙热龙卷风后， 身体被狱火包围，一边滑翔一边突袭敌人。
description.en: Faleris' exclusive skill. After creating scorching tornadoes, it cloaks itself in hellfire and charges forward.

description.zh: 在头上生成巨大火球，并向敌人发射。 中弹后会爆炸，造成大范围爆炸冲击波。
description.en: Creates a giant ball of flame and hurls it at an enemy. The ball explodes over a wide area upon impact.

description.zh: 召唤雷电 在一定时间后生成大量落电。
description.en: Calls lightning that strikes an enemy after a set amount of time has passed.

description.zh: 向前方发射呈扇形扩散的雷电球。
description.en: Releases lightning orbs in a fan shape, spreading as they travel.

description.zh: 快速放电 给周围造成冲击。
description.en: Quickly discharges electricity, shocking those around it.

description.zh: 发射雷电球 并缓慢追击敌人。
description.en: Fires an electric ball that slowly pursues an enemy.

description.zh: 生成两个蕴含雷电能量的球 然后瞄准敌人，从中发射无数雷球。
description.en: Creates two balls of electric energy that fire numerous lightning orbs at enemies.

description.zh: 瞄准敌人后 发射超高速的雷电激光。
description.en: Takes aim at an enemy before firing a super high speed laser.

description.zh: 暴电熊的专用技能。 飞扑向敌人，并用带电流的爪子将其劈开。 飞扑2次后，面向地面伸出爪子， 大范围扩散电流。
description.en: Grizzbolt's exclusive skill. After leaping at an enemy and tearing at it twice with its electrically charged claws, it attacks the ground, sending an electric shock throughout the area.

description.zh: 生成可笔直前进的雷击。
description.en: Generates a lightning bolt that moves forward in a line.

description.zh: 雷胖达的专用技能。 不停转动右臂，向前方挥出带电拳击。
description.en: Mossanda Lux's exclusive skill. Winds up its right arm before delivering an electrically charged punch.

description.zh: 在敌人头上生成3次落雷。
description.en: Generates lightning that strikes an enemy three times from above.

description.zh: 雷角马的专用技能。 在自己的周围降下落雷， 同时猛力冲向敌人。
description.en: Univolt's exclusive skill. Generates bolts of lightning all around while charging at its target.

description.zh: 波鲁杰克斯的专用技能。 向上跳起后召唤雷枪， 将之丢向敌人。
description.en: Orserk's exclusive skill. Summons a spear of lightning while leaping into the air before throwing it at an enemy.

description.zh: 让自己化作避雷针引来雷电， 并在原地引发闪电爆炸。
description.en: Acts as a lightning rod, calling down thunderbolts that electrocute the surrounding area.

description.zh: 积蓄雷电之力 瞄准敌人释放强劲电击。
description.en: Charges electric energy before blasting enemies with a powerful shock.

description.zh: 用黏糊糊的泥巴 瞄准敌人并发射。
description.en: Hurls sticky mud at an enemy.

description.zh: 向前方射出大量的小石头碎屑。
description.en: Fires a barrage of stones forward.

description.zh: 碎岩龟的专用技能。 以全身高速旋转的方式移动， 并以钻头刨削敌人，持续对目标造成伤害。
description.en: Digtoise's exclusive skill. Moves while spinning its whole body at high speed. Drills through enemies, dealing continuous damage.

description.zh: 将岩石从眼前的地上吸附起来 瞄准敌人并发射。
description.en: Digs up a boulder and hurls it at an enemy.

description.zh: 铠格力斯及亚种的专用技能。 以四支粗壮的角串起敌人。
description.en: Warsect's exclusive skill. Skewers enemies with its four sturdy horns.

description.zh: 在左右两侧生成砂砾龙卷风， 并扇向敌人。
description.en: Generates two sand tornadoes on either side before launching them at an enemy.

description.zh: 阿努比斯的专用技能。 用强健的腿脚回旋飞踢，大范围横扫周围的敌人。
description.en: Anubis' exclusive skill. Performs a spin kick with its strong legs, sweeping enemies over a wide area.

description.zh: 森猛犸及亚种的专用技能。 以巨大的身躯撼动大地， 对四周大范围的目标造成伤害。
description.en: Mammorest's exclusive skill. Uses its massive body to shake the earth, dealing damage over a wide area.

description.zh: 阿努比斯的专用技能。 快速移动追击敌人， 释放能量同时不断挥出强劲利拳。
description.en: Anubis' exclusive skill. Rapidly pursues its foes while releasing energy and unleashing a powerful punch.

description.zh: 阿努比斯的专用技能。 高高跃起后，对地面使出猛力一击。 产生的衝击波将对大范围的目标造成伤害。
description.en: Anubis' exclusive skill. Leaps high into the air and strikes a punch to the ground, causing a shockwave that deals damge over a wide area.

description.zh: 在敌人的脚边 生成尖锐的岩石长矛。
description.en: Generates a sharp rock spear under an enemy.

description.zh: 用蕴藏龙之力的能量弹 瞄准敌人并发射。
description.en: Hurls an energy ball imbued with draconic energy at an enemy.

description.zh: 快速释放龙之力 给周围造成冲击。
description.en: Quickly discharges draconic energy, damaging those around it.

description.zh: 向前方呼出蕴含龙之力的气息 ，持续对目标造成伤害。
description.en: Exhales breath imbued with draconic energy, dealing continuous damage to those in front of it.

description.zh: 精灵龙及亚种的专用技能。 发射2股蕴含不可思议能力的龙卷风， 追击敌人。
description.en: Elphidran's exclusive skill. Generates twin whirlwinds imbued with a mysterious power that pursues enemies.

description.zh: 空涡龙的专用技能。 展开发光的翅膀， 并发射大量光束朝敌人飞去。 光束命中目标便会引发爆炸。
description.en: Jetragon's exclusive skill. Illuminates its wings and fires innumerable beams as it flies towards the enemy. The beams explode on impact.

description.zh: 召唤大量小陨石 瞄准敌人并发射。
description.en: Summons numerous small meteorites and launches them at an enemy.

description.zh: 于前方制造毒雾， 使目标陷入中毒状态。
description.en: Generates a fog of poison in front, causing the opponent to become poisoned.

description.zh: 用蕴藏剧毒之力的淤泥 瞄准敌人并发射。
description.en: Hurls poison sludge at an enemy.

description.zh: 发射以缓慢速度追击敌人的黑暗之球。
description.en: Unleashes a sphere of darkness that slowly tracks down an enemy.

description.zh: 快速释放黑暗之力 给周围造成冲击。
description.en: Quickly discharges dark energy, damaging those around it.

description.zh: 黑鸦隐士的专用技能。 瞬间移动至敌人身旁， 再以鸟喙发动攻击。
description.en: Cawgnito's exclusive skill. Teleports next to an enemy before attacking with its beak.

description.zh: WereWolf的专用技能。 向前一跃，迅速斩下两击。 且每次斩击都充满了暗属性的力量。
description.en: WereWolf's exclusive skill. Leaps forward and attacks twice with vicious claws imbued with dark energy.

description.zh: 发射3个怨念 并执着追击敌人。
description.en: Fires three balls of malice that relentlessly pursue an enemy.

description.zh: 邪麒麟的专用技能。 带着缠绕全身的暗黑火焰向前猛冲。 途经之处均会留下滚滚火焰。
description.en: Pyrin Noct's exclusive skill. Charges forward while engulfed in a veil of dark flames. Flames continue to burn in its path.

description.zh: 生成巨大的黑暗之球 瞄准敌人并高速发射。
description.en: Creates a giant ball of darkness and hurls it at an enemy.

description.zh: 用重力剥夺敌人的行动自由， 并将其从高处砸向地面。
description.en: Utilizes gravity to deprive enemies of their freedom, then slams them into the ground from high above.

description.zh: 混沌骑士的专用技能。 以旋风包覆双手的长枪后， 朝前方冲刺并左右交替刺击。
description.en: Necromus' exclusive skill. Clads its twin spears with vicious whirlwinds and charges forward, thrusting them one after the other.

description.zh: 积蓄黑暗之力 瞄准敌人发射强劲光线。
description.en: Charges dark energy before blasting enemies with a powerful beam.

description.zh: 异构格里芬的专用技能。 在向前猛冲的同时制造出光球。 光球会自动捕捉敌人，并射出大量激光。
description.en: Charges forward, generating orbs of light that automatically target enemies and unleash a barrage of lasers.

description.zh: 发射多个可以追击敌人的黑暗之球。
description.en: Fires a menacing ball of dark energy that pursues enemies.

description.zh: 疾旋鼬及亚种的专用技能。 短时间蓄力后，向前跃起。 在着地时因为害怕一直都是紧闭着眼睛。
description.en: Chillet's exclusive skill. Gathers a bit of strength and leaps forward. Always shuts its eyes tight in fear when landing.

description.zh: 撼动地面， 使大块岩石射向四面八方
description.en: Causes the ground to shake before hurling a massive stone mass at its surroundings.

description.zh: 在敌人头顶生无数个冰块， 随后接连落下攻击目标。
description.en: Creates numerous lumps of ice that are consecutively dropped on a foe's head.

description.zh: 用龙属性的射线一扫前方。 被扫过地方将产生延迟爆炸。
description.en: Mows down the area in front with a beam imbued with dragon power. The area struck by the beam will also explode after a short delay.

description.zh: 贝菈露洁的专用技能。 趁敌人不注意时隐去身影，并在现身的瞬间射出无数光线， 且光线会犹如绽放的花朵般扩散。
description.en: Bellanoir Libero's exclusive skill. Disappears suddenly, then reappears while firing a barrage of beams. The beams spread like a beautiful flower in bloom.

description.zh: 贝菈露洁的专用技能。 在摇曳起舞的同时製造一圈圈火焰， 使之向周围扩散， 并发射妖异的火球来追击敌人。
description.en: Bellanoir Libero's exclusive skill. With a graceful dance, conjuries expanding rings of fire, then unleashes eerie flames that seek the enemies.

description.zh: 召唤陨石垂直落下， 并在撞击点产生冲击波。
description.en: Drops a meteorite straight down, generating a shock wave around the impact area.

description.zh: 向前方发射呈扇形扩散的高速暗黑球。
description.en: Fires high-speed dark orbs in a fan shape, spreading as they travel.

description.zh: 将带有黑暗力量的高速能量弹射向敌人。
description.en: Hurls an energy ball imbued with dark energy at an enemy.

description.zh: 使用暗之力连续发射数支高速箭追击敌人。
description.en: Fires off dark energy that homes in on an enemy.

description.zh: 于敌人周围生成数个暗黑龙卷风。
description.en: Generates several dark vortexes around the enemy.

description.zh: 贝菈诺娃的专用技能。 趁敌人不注意时隐去身影，并在再次现身的瞬间射出无数光线。
description.en: Bellanoir's exclusive skill. Disappears suddenly, then reappears while firing a barrage of beams.

description.zh: 冥铠蝎及亚种的专用技能。 高高跃起，用尾巴狠狠地将猎物刺穿。 尾部含有毒素。
description.en: Menasting's exclusive skill. Jumps high and forcefully stabs its prey with its tail. The poison from the tail is deadly.

description.zh: 在敌人周围生成一碰就爆炸的星星。 星星在经过一定时间后，没有触碰也会爆炸。
description.en: Generates stars around the enemy that explode on contact. Stars also explode after some time.

description.zh: 战冠雀的专用技能。 一口气提高速度，向前方突进。
description.en: Dazemu's exclusive skill. Accelerates all at once and dashes forward at high speed.

description.zh: 在敌人的位置和其周围刺出尖锐的根刺。
description.en: Sprouts sharp roots in and around the enemy's location.

description.zh: 波鲁杰克斯的专用技能。 召唤数把雷枪，向敌人投掷而出，并引发爆炸。
description.en: Orserk's exclusive skill. Summons numerous thunder spears and hurls them at the enemy. The first spear is imbued with the power of lightning and explodes after a few seconds.

description.zh: 殁殃的专用技能。 高高跃上空中后，边在空中高速移动，边积蓄力量。 然后打出全力一击。
description.en: Blazamut Ryu's exclusive skill. After a big jump, moves at high speed in the air, gathering strength to unleash a powerful punch.

description.zh: 召唤一束直线前进的水柱。
description.en: Generates a column of water that travels in a straight line.

description.zh: 向敌人发射积蓄着龙属性力量的能量弹。 能量弹在着弹时将引发大范围爆炸。
description.en: Fires an energy orb infused with draconic power at the enemy. The orb causes a wide-area explosion upon impact.

description.zh: 焰煌及亚种的专用技能。 伸展开手臂，使肌肉剧烈膨胀后， 猛地拍击在一起引发巨大爆炸。
description.en: Blazamut's exclusive skill. Raises and inflates its arms, then slams them together, causing a massive explosion in the surrounding area.

description.zh: 泰锋的专用技能。 大幅回旋身体投掷出背后的岩盘。 岩盘将会以圆弧轨道状飞行。
description.en: Knocklem's exclusive skill. Takes a big swing and throws the ring from its back. The ring flies in a circular trajectory.

description.zh: 向敌人的位置发射充满龙属性的能量弹。 能量弹在着弹时将向周围扩散，在前方广范围引发爆炸。
description.en: Fires an energy bullet imbued with dragon power at the enemy's location. Upon impact, the bullet shatters and creates a frontal long-range explosion.

description.zh: 召唤陨石接连落下， 并在撞击点产生冲击波。
description.en: Drops meteorites one after another, generating shock waves around the impact areas.

description.zh: 召唤无数陨石落下， 并在撞击点产生冲击波。
description.en: Drops countless meteorites, generating an array of shock waves.

description.zh: 向上空喷射无数熔岩弹。 一段时间后，射出的熔岩弹将如雨一般散落在周围。
description.en: Fires countless volcanic bombs into the sky. After a while, the bombs rain down around their originator.

description.zh: 暴电熊的专用技能。 不知从哪取出加特林机枪进行扫射。 最后一发将射出强力的充能弹。
description.en: Grizzbolt's exclusive skill. Pulls out a minigun out of nowhere and starts blasting. Finishes with a single, charged power shot.

description.zh: 百合女王的专用技能。 使用治愈的力量恢复范围内同伴的HP。
description.en: Lyleen's exclusive skill. Restores health to all allies within range using the power of healing.

description.zh: 在敌人脚下和四周引发大范围的光柱爆炸。
description.en: Creates a wide explosion of light at the enemy's location and around it.

description.zh: 杰诺贝达的专用技能。 灵活的跃起，用左手撕裂敌人。
description.en: Xenovader's exclusive skill. Swiftly pounces and slashes with its left hand.

description.zh: 辉月伊的专用技能。 将能量积蓄于背后的月亮， 然后向前方发出新月形的射线。
description.en: Selyne's exclusive skill. Stores energy in the moon on its back, then fires a crescent-shaped beam forward.

description.zh: 在敌人的位置燃起火焰之墙。 火墙将持续一段时间， 对碰到的敌人造成伤害。
description.en: Creates a wall of flames at the enemy's location. The wall of flames will remain for a while, and deal damage to the enemies it touches.

description.zh: 扇形发射锋利的气刃。
description.en: Sends out sharp blades of air in a fan shape.

description.zh: 辉月伊的专用技能。 挥出蕴含月光力量的高速二连斩击。
description.en: Selyne's exclusive skill. Fires two consecutive high-speed blades imbued with the power of moonlight.

description.zh: 汪宗师的专用技能。 摆出合气道的架势，在架势中受到的攻击将无效化， 同时一瞬间迫近敌人，使出全身力量掌击。
description.en: Dogen's exclusive skill. Adopts an aiki stance. While in this stance, nulify any incoming attack, instantly close in on the enemy, and counter with a full-forced palm strike.

description.zh: 连续在敌人的脚下生成水柱结成的墙壁。
description.en: Continously creates walls made from water columns at the enemy's location.

description.zh: 同时发射直线飞行的高速雷球， 和追踪敌人的慢速雷球。
description.en: A high-speed lightning ball that flies in a straight line. Simultaneously fires slow lightning balls that track the enemy.

description.zh: 召唤巨大的雷属性龙卷风。 龙卷风将追踪敌人缓慢移动。
description.en: Generates a huge tornado of lightning that moves slowly towards the enemy.

description.zh: 蛊刺妖的专用技能。 快速缩短和敌人的距离， 狠狠的用钳子使出上勾拳。
description.en: Prixter's exclusive skill. Closes the distance to the enemy at high speed, then swings its pincers upward with full force.

description.zh: 使用火焰的力量做出复数个球体， 然后向敌人发射无数火球。
description.en: Creates multiple spheres of fiery energy, from which countless fireballs shoot towards the enemy.

description.zh: 生成复数个砂龙卷。 龙卷风们将一边自旋一边绕中心旋转。
description.en: Creates multiple sand tornadoes. The tornadoes continuously spin in circles.

description.zh: 向八个方向召唤直线推进的雷击。
description.en: Generates lightning strikes that travel in a straight line in all directions.

description.zh: 积蓄雷电的力量到极限， 朝敌人同时发射多道强力雷击。
description.en: Charge the power of lightning to the limit and fires multiple simultaneous electric shocks at the enemy.

description.zh: 锁定敌人后，连续射出超高速的雷射。
description.en: After aiming at the enemy, fires multiple ultra-fast lightning lasers.

description.zh: 使出浑身力量 向各个方向喷洒毒球。
description.en: Focuses energy into the body and scatters poison orbs in all directions.

description.zh: 在空中生成复数个冰锥， 瞄准敌人一齐射出。
description.en: Generates multiple sharp ice blocks in the sky and fires them at the enemy.

description.zh: 做出两个巨大的冰块， 瞄准敌人先后发射。 撞击后对周围造成冲击。
description.en: Creates two huge ice blocks and fires them at the enemy one after another. On impact, it also shocks those close by.

description.zh: 大范围的在敌人脚下生成冰柱穿刺。
description.en: Throws icicles in a wide area from under the enemy's feet.

description.zh: 瞄准敌人射出无数风刃。
description.en: Shoots countless wind swords that fly straight towards the enemy.

description.zh: 扇形射出锐利的风刃。
description.en: Launches sharp blades of air that fan out.

description.zh: 荷鲁斯的专用技能。 卷起数个灼热的龙卷风， 同时身缠烈焰，飞空向敌人突进。 龙卷风最终将融合为巨大火龙卷。
description.en: Faleris' exclusive skill. Generates multiple scorching tornadoes and charges forward while gliding. The tornadoes converge in the center and eventually merge into a single massive tornado.

description.zh: 异构格里芬的专用技能。 一边突进，一边从身体的圆环出射出无数的蓝色光束。 光束会自动追踪敌人。
description.en: Shadowbeak's exclusive skill. As it charges forward, emits countless blue rays that automatically locate and pursue the enemy.

description.zh: 辉月伊的专用技能。 挥出蕴含月光力量的高速三连斩击。
description.en: Selyne's exclusive skill. Fires three consecutive high-speed slashes imbued with the power of moonlight.

description.zh: 召唤朝前方三个方向推进的冰柱
description.en: Generates pillars of ice that move in a straight line in three directions.

description.zh: 狱焰王及亚种的专用技能。 毫不留情的气势汹汹扑向敌人， 在扑击的地点引发火属性的爆炸。
description.en: Blazehowl's exclusive skill. With momentum, it pounces mercilessly on the enemy and causes an explosion of fire at the point of impact.

description.zh: 迅雷鸟的专用技能。 先在敌人所在位置降下落雷。 然后在空中突进的同时，于左右两侧召唤落雷。
description.en: Beakon's exclusive skill. First, it strikes the enemy's location with lightning. Then, while gliding forward, it drops lightning to the left and right.

description.zh: 魔渊龙的专用技能。 在向前方挥出两拳后， 向下呼出龙属性的吐息。
description.en: Astegon's exclusive skill. After throwing two punches forward, it exhales a dragon breath downward.

description.zh: 踏春兔的专用技能。 向前方跳起的同时高速回旋踢击， 将周围一扫而净。
description.en: Verdash's exclusive skill. While jumping forward, it sweeps the surroundings with a high-speed spinning kick.

description.zh: 白绒雪怪的专用技能。 一边向前方突进一边滚动雪球， 在雪球滚的足够大时投掷出去，使其炸裂。
description.en: Wumpo's exclusive skill. Rolls a snowball as it moves forward, and when it grows large enough, it throws it to cause an explosion.

description.zh: 覆海龙的专用技能。 起身咆哮，使用身缠浪涛的巨大身躯蛇形向敌人突进。
description.en: Jormuntide's exclusive skill. Letting out a roar, it charges toward the enemy, twisting its water-covered body as it advances.

description.zh: 骑士蜂的专用技能。 朝向敌人高速突刺。 最后使出致命一击贯穿敌人。
description.en: Beegarde's exclusive skill. Charges at the enemy at high speed, delivering a final thrust with a spear.

description.zh: 燧火鸟的专用技能。 飞向前方的同时，朝正前、右、左啄击， 并通过点火引发小规模的爆炸。
description.en: Ragnahawk's exclusive skill. While flapping forward, it strikes with its beak to ignite fires in front, right, and left, causing a small explosion.

description.zh: 霹雳犬的专用技能。 在前方呼唤连续不断的雷击， 在落下的雷电间高速突进。
description.en: Rayhound's exclusive skill. Summons lightning one after another in front, then charges forward at high speed through the gaps between the falling bolts.

description.zh: 噬魂兽的专用技能。 缓慢奔跑的同时，不断召唤摇曳的火球飞向敌人。
description.en: Maraith's exclusive skill. While running slowly, it continuously launches flickering fireballs toward the enemy.

description.zh: 烽歌龙的专用技能。 一边从口部喷出火焰一边前进。
description.en: Vanwyrms exclusive skill. Advances while breathing fire from its mouth.

description.zh: 冰棘兽的专用技能。 在两次挥击后，使出浑身力气大幅挥动巨爪。 每次挥动巨爪时，都会向前方扇形区域飞出冰柱。
description.en: Cryolinx's exclusive skill. First, it strikes with its claws, followed by a second slash, and culminates with a powerful slash using its entire body. When swinging the claws, ice pillars are launched forward in a fan shape.

description.zh: 杰诺多兰的专用技能。 召唤4个有自动攻击能力的卫星型羽毛。 羽毛在进行攻击时会自动追踪敌人。
description.en: Xenolord's exclusive skill. Generates four satellite-like wings with auto-attack functionality. These wings will automatically track and attack the enemy when the next attack is launched.

description.zh: 杰诺多兰的专用技能。 从亚空间呼唤毁灭的光束不断进行横向垂直扫射， 将视野范围内的一切燃烧殆尽。
description.en: Xenolord's exclusive skill. Summons the light of destruction from subspace and continuously fires it in all directions, burning everything in its sight to ashes.

description.zh: 杰诺多兰的专用技能。 集中充盈暗黑力量的能量， 一口气以直线状放出。
description.en: Xenolord's exclusive skill. Concentrates energy filled with darkness and releases it all at once in a straight line.

description.zh: 杰诺多兰的专用技能。 在右手生成高功率的光剑， 高速移动同时进行二连斩击。
description.en: Xenolord's exclusive skill. Generates a high-output beam sword with the right hand and delivers two powerful slashes while moving at high speed.

description.zh: 杰诺多兰的专用技能。 以光速飞上高空，射出无数的流星弹。 之后将自身化为彗星向地面突进， 在撞击的地点引发大范围的爆炸。
description.en: Xenolord's exclusive skill. Soars into the air at the speed of light and releases countless meteor projectiles. Afterwards, transforms into a comet and charges forward, causing a massive explosion upon impact.

description.zh: 霜歌龙的专用技能。 一边从口部呼出冷气一边前进。
description.en: Vanwyrm Cryst's exclusive skill. Advances while exhaling cold air from its mouth.

description.zh: 腾炎龙的专用技能。 起身咆哮，使用身缠炽炎的巨大身躯蛇形向敌人突进。
description.en: Jormuntide Ignis's exclusive skill. Letting out a roar, it charges toward the enemy, twisting its fire-covered body as it advances.

description.zh: 金棘兽的专用技能。 在两次挥击后，使出浑身力气大幅挥动巨爪。 每次挥动巨爪时，都会向前方扇形区域飞出碎岩。
description.en: Cryolinx Terra's exclusive skill. First, it strikes with its claws, followed by a second slash, and culminates with a powerful slash using its entire body. When swinging the claws, rocks are launched forward in a fan shape.

description.zh: 雷隐鹿的专用技能。 操控大气，身缠雷云向前猛冲。
description.en: Charges forward while manipulating the atmosphere and enveloping itself in thunderclouds.

description.zh: WereWolf_Ice的专用技能。 向前一跃，迅速斩下两击。 且每次斩击都充满了冰属性的力量。
description.en: WereWolf_Ice's exclusive skill. Leaps forward and attacks twice with vicious claws imbued with ice element.

description.zh: 伊西斯的专用技能。 扇起漩涡龙卷风后， 化身为波涛，一边滑翔一边突袭敌人。
description.en: Faleris Aqua's exclusive skill. After summoning a massive tornado, it envelops its body in water and charges forward.

description.zh: 幽焰狼的专用技能。 带着缠绕全身的紫色火焰，气势汹汹地向前猛冲。
description.en: Kitsun Noct's exclusive skill. Charges forward with great speed while enveloped in intense purple flames.

description.zh: 震动地面， 并令巨大的岩石飞起。
description.en: Shakes the ground and lifts a massive boulder into the air.

description.zh: 绿苔绒怪的专用技能。 一边向前方突进一边滚动草球， 在草球滚的足够大时投掷出去，使其炸裂。
description.en: Wumpo Botan's exclusive skill. Rolls a ball made of grass as it moves forward, and when it grows large enough, it throws it to cause an explosion.

description.zh: 霜牙王的专用技能。 大声咆哮的同时高高跳起， 落地后将双臂埋入地面，产生巨大的龟裂冰川。 之后不断向地面积蓄力量，最终引发巨大的冰属性爆炸。
description.en: Bastigor's exclusive skill. Let out a mighty roar and leap into the air. Then, embed both arms into the ground to create a massive ice crack. Continue to channel power into the ground, ultimately causing a large explosion of ice energy

description.zh: 桃蛛娘的专用技能。 吐出丝线缠绕住猎物。 之后全速冲向猎物所在位置， 打出三段攻击以使其毙命。
description.en: Tarantriss's exclusive skill. Spits out a ball of thread, entangling the target it hits. Then, rushes at full speed to the trapped target and delivers three slashing strikes to finish it off.

description.zh: 霜牙王的专用技能。 踩踏地面，在前方产生断裂的冰川。 之后一口气接近敌人，用右手将其撕裂。
description.en: Bastigor's exclusive skill. Stomps the ground, creating a fissure of ice ahead. Then, rapidly closes the distance and slashes with the right hand.

description.zh: 面惧的专用技能。 突然出现在敌人附近并用双手将其束缚， 并吸收受到束缚敌人的HP。
description.en: Omasculs exclusive skill. Suddenly appears near the enemy, firmly restraining them with its arms, and absorbs the HP of the restrained enemy.

description.zh: 幽恋娜的专用技能。 从原先位置瞬间移动的同时打出斩击。 然后瞬移至目标头顶， 用利刃刺穿猎物并产生暗属性能量波。
description.en: Splatterina's exclusive skill. Teleports instantly and launches a slash. It then teleports above the enemy, drives its weapon into them, and unleashes a wave of dark energy.

description.zh: 艾基鲁迦的专用技能。 在前方展开能够减轻各种伤害的能量盾的同时， 将突进道路上的敌人碾碎。
description.en: Silvegis's exclusive skill. Deploys a shield in front that reduces all types of attacks, then charges forward, crushing the enemy.

description.zh: 驭雷马的专用技能。 以闪电般的速度移动， 并将途径的所有存在都卷入。
description.en: Azurmane's exclusive skill. Moves with the speed of lightning, engulfing everything in its path.

description.zh: 净世鹿的专用技能。 在前方引发大范围的圣光爆炸后， 边缓慢行走边在自身周围降下神圣之光。
description.en: Celesdir's exclusive skill. After igniting a burst of holy light across a vast area ahead, it strides forward, radiating holy light around itself.

description.zh: 夜冥驹的专用技能。 用鬼魅般的步伐玩弄敌人， 同时用锐利的角挥出斩击。
description.en: Starryon's exclusive skill. Confuses enemies with flickering steps and launches slashing attack with its sharp horn.

description.zh: 金驰兽的专用技能。 在气势汹汹突进的同时，令碎岩向左右飞溅。
description.en: Gildane's exclusive skill. Charges forward, hurling rocks to the left and right with great force.

description.zh: 在敌人所在位置及其周围区域 喷出大量水柱。
description.en: Erupts massive pillars of water beneath and around the enemy.

description.zh: 在敌人四周掀起波浪并涌向敌人， 最后在中心点爆炸，喷出高高的水柱。
description.en: Generates waves that surge around the enemy from all sides. They converge and explode at the center, erupting into a column of water.

description.zh: 用压缩水流一扫前方。 被扫过的区域会在片刻后喷出水柱。
description.en: Mows down the frontal area with a blast of compressed water. The area struck by the blast erupts with water after a short delay.

description.zh: 向前方发射高压水流。 片刻后，水流会向左右分岔。
description.en: Fires a high-pressure stream of water forward. After a short delay, the stream branches off to the left and right.

description.zh: 在敌人前方生成风刃， 并对其发动十字斩击。
description.en: Conjures blades of wind in front of the enemy, converging to deliver a cutting cross attack.

description.zh: 从地面召唤出冰墙。 冰墙会持续一段时间， 并在承受一定伤害后碎裂。
description.en: Creates a wall of ice that rises from the ground. The ice wall remains standing for a while, and breaks after taking enough damage.

description.zh: 墨沫姬及亚种的专用技能。 向前方释放烟雾遮蔽自身， 从隐蔽状态中突然发动头槌，猛击敌人。
description.en: Gloopie's exclusive skill. Releases smoke to conceal itself, then launches a surprise headbutt from the shadows.

description.zh: 盔盔仔及亚种的专用技能。 利用水流喷射推进力， 一边高速旋转一边向敌人飞旋而去。
description.en: Turtacle's exclusive skill. Uses jet-powered propulsion to spin rapidly and launch itself at the enemy.

description.zh: 达鼠泥的专用技能。 短暂蓄力后高速撞击敌人， 同时做出后空翻动作。
description.en: Herbil's exclusive skill. After a brief moment of preparation, charges at the enemy at high speed, finishing with a flip.

description.zh: 凉晶鲸及亚种的专用技能。 笔直突进后短暂潜伏， 接着高高跃起进行攻击。 跃起时会引发冰属性爆炸。
description.en: Whalaska's exclusive skill. Charges straight ahead and briefly submerges, then bursts high into the air to launch an attack. An ice-element explosion occurs upon emerging.

description.zh: 冥灯鱼的专用技能。 使用头部长长的提灯横扫前方大范围目标。
description.en: Ghangler's exclusive skill. Lashes forward with the lantern atop its head, sweeping broadly ahead.

description.zh: 布偶鲨及亚种的专用技能。 从口中取出两把水枪， 左右轮流射出6发水弹。 最后双枪合并，射出一发强力水弹。
description.en: Finsider's exclusive skill. Draws twin water blasters from its mouth, firing six shots alternately left and right, then finishes by combining both blasters to unleash one powerful shot.

description.zh: 发射逐渐加速的黑暗能量弹
description.en: Fires a dark energy projectile that accelerates over time.

description.zh: 向敌人发射高速直线飞行的雷枪。
description.en: Fires a high-speed lightning spear straight ahead towards the enemy.

description.zh: 发射风刃， 在击中敌人或树木时反弹并连续造成攻击， 最多可反弹4次。
description.en: Launches a blade of wind that rebounds off enemies or trees, striking repeatedly. Can ricochet up to four times.

description.zh: 肚肚鳄的专用技能。 连续喷吐3颗体内尚未消化 但已经冷却的手榴弹进行攻击。 有时还会喷出更危险的东西……？
description.en: Munchill's exclusive skill. Coughs up three cold grenades kept undigested inside its body and lobs them at enemies. May occasionally spit out something more dangerous...?

description.zh: 克苏鲁之眼的专用技能。 多次朝敌人发起冲锋。
description.en: Eye of Cthulhu's exclusive skill. Repeatedly charges at the enemy.

description.zh: 克苏鲁之眼的专用技能。 召唤4个仆从撞向敌人并造成伤害。仆从会在受到攻击或经过一定时间后消失。
description.en: Eye of Cthulhu's exclusive skill. Summons four Servants that charge at enemies to deal damage. Servants disappear after taking damage or after a short time.

description.zh: 炙灯鱼的专用技能。 使用头部附着火焰的提灯横扫前方大范围目标。
description.en: Ghangler Ignis's exclusive skill. Lashes forward with the flaming lantern atop its head, sweeping broadly ahead.

description.zh: 闪丸王的专用技能。 全身电流涌动，腹部着地滑行 并用力撞向敌人。
description.en: Penking Lux's exclusive skill. Lies on its belly while generating electric charge all around it before sliding at enemies at high speed.

description.zh: 梁叶龙的专用技能。 从修长的颈部缓缓释放出草属性的气息， 逐渐向四周扩散。
description.en: Braloha's exclusive skill. From the base of its long neck to the tip of its snout, it gradually spreads the breath of grass element.

description.zh: 咕咕桑葩的专用技能。 冲刺助跑后向敌人发动猛烈踢击。
description.en: Palumba's exclusive skill. Dashes to build up speed, then launches a devastating airborne kick at its target.

description.zh: 海皇鲸的专用技能。 身体略微上浮并在口中凝聚水流。 随后纵横挥扫出三股高压水流。 被扫过的区域会出现裂缝并喷出水柱。
description.en: Neptilius's exclusive skill. Rising slightly, it gathers water at its mouth, then sweeps a high-pressure stream vertically and horizontally three times. Fissures form at the swept locations, erupting with water.

description.zh: 夜明史莱姆的专用技能。 跳向敌人发动攻击。
description.en: Illuminant Slime's exclusive skill. Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

description.zh: 绿史莱姆的专用技能。 跳向敌人发动攻击。
description.en: Green Slime's exclusive skill. Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

description.zh: 蓝史莱姆的专用技能。 跳向敌人发动攻击。
description.en: Blue Slime's exclusive skill. Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

description.zh: 红史莱姆的专用技能。 跳向敌人发动攻击。
description.en: Red Slime's exclusive skill. Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

description.zh: 紫史莱姆的专用技能。 跳向敌人发动攻击。
description.en: Purple Slime's exclusive skill. Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

description.zh: 彩虹史莱姆的专用技能。 跳向敌人发动攻击。
description.en: Rainbow Slime's exclusive skill. Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

description.zh: 恶魔眼的专用技能。 朝敌人发起冲锋。撞到地面或墙壁时会反弹。
description.en: Demon Eye's exclusive skill. Charges at the enemy, bouncing off the ground or walls on impact.

description.zh: 附魔剑的专用技能。 朝敌人发动突刺攻击。
description.en: Enchanted Sword's exclusive skill. Lunges forward to deliver a sharp thrust.

description.zh: 洞穴蝙蝠的专用技能。 利用全身扑向敌人发起进攻。撞到地面或墙壁时会反弹。
description.en: Cave Bat's exclusive skill. Using its whole body, it lunges at the enemy, bouncing off the ground or walls on impact.

description.zh: 使用持有的武器进行攻击。
description.en: Attack with held weapon.

description.zh: 雷冠龙的专用技能。 使用巨大的尾巴拍打前方地面， 对直线范围造成雷击。
description.en: Dinossom Lux's exclusive skill. Uses its large tail to strike the ground in front of it, delivering a bolt of lightning in a straight line.

description.zh: 冰帝美露帕的专用技能。 向上高高跳起后， 用自身庞大的身躯及冰晶辗压敌人。
description.en: Kingpaca Cryst's exclusive skill. Leaps high into the air before smashing into an enemy with ice and its chubby, massive body.

description.zh: 暗魔羊的专用技能。 接近目标后跳起同时以左手暗爪向上挥击， 再用右手暗爪迅速向下挥砍。
description.en: Incineram Noct's exclusive skill. Draws near enemies using its left dark claw to slash them into the air before cutting them down with its right dark claw.

description.zh: 海誓龙的专用技能。 侧身站立，然后向前猛撞敌人， 溅起水花并将其击飞。
description.en: Broncherry Aqua's exclusive skill. Turns sideways before tackling enemies in front of it, sending them flying with a burst of water.

description.zh: 祇岳鹿的专用技能。 面向敌人冲刺，用尖角卷起泥土攻击敌人。 如在骑乘时发动，可操控前进方向。
description.en: Eikthyrdeer Terra's exclusive skill. Charges at foes and uses its antlers to whip mud at them. When used while riding, the direction of the charge can be controlled.

description.zh: 石掌猿的专用技能。 猛击地面两次后高高跳起， 再赏给对方汇聚大地之力的一拳。
description.en: Gorirat Terra's exclusive skill. Pounds the ground twice before leaping into the air and delivers a powerful punch infused with the Power of Gaia.

description.zh: 唤夜兽的专用技能。 用暗能量包裹翅膀后，全力奔跑以双翼撕裂敌人。 且暗能量最后会化为追踪弹攻击敌人。
description.en: Frostallion Noct's exclusive skill. Dashes forward while concentrating dark energy around its wings, using them to slash enemies, then converting that energy into homing shots

description.zh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。
description.en: Launches a rapid succession of bites at the enemy.

description.zh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。
description.en: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

description.zh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。
description.en: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

description.zh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。
description.en: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

description.zh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。
description.en: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

description.zh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。
description.en: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

description.zh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。
description.en: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

description.zh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。
description.en: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

description.zh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。
description.en: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

description.zh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。
description.en: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

description.zh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。

description.zh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。
description.en: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

description.zh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。
description.en: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

description.zh: 流焰龙的专用技能。 从口中喷涌而出炽热光束，焚烧大地。 灼热的地面会形成岩浆池， 对碰到的敌人造成伤害。
description.en: Moldron's exclusive skill. Emits a thermal beam from its mouth that scorches the ground. Heated ground forms magma pools that damage enemies on contact.

description.zh: 流焰龙的专用技能。 从口中吐出岩浆团进行攻击。 在落点形成岩浆池， 对碰到的敌人造成伤害。
description.en: Moldron's exclusive skill. Spits a mass of magma from its mouth. The impact creates magma pools that damage enemies on contact.

description.zh: 塞赫麦特的专用技能。 抓挠敌人的同时向后翻跃，与敌人拉开距离。
description.en: Sekhmets exclusive skill. Scratches the enemy while performing a backward somersault to create distance.

description.zh: 塞赫麦特的专用技能。 旋转突进，一口气拉近距离并抓挠敌人。
description.en: Sekhmets exclusive skill. Spins forward to quickly close the distance and scratch the enemy.

description.zh: 夜冥驹的专用技能。 周身缠绕跃动的火焰，朝敌人冲锋。
description.en: Starryon's exclusive skill. Cloaks the body in flickering flames and charges toward the enemy.

description.zh: 驭雷马的专用技能。 周身缠绕雷电，朝敌人高速猛冲。
description.en: Azurmane's exclusive skill. Cloaks the body in lightning and performs a high-speed charge toward the enemy.

description.zh: 默世鹿的专用技能。 一瞬间隐去身姿，然后以自身为中心在大范围召唤大量光柱落下。
description.en: Hartalis' exclusive skill. Fades from sight, then calls down a massive barrage of light pillars centered on its position.

description.zh: 默世鹿的专用技能。 向后方跳跃并在背后展开光翼， 从空中向敌人发起突击。
description.en: Hartalis' exclusive skill. Leaps back and sprouts wings of light, then dives toward the enemy.

description.zh: 发射一个缓慢追踪敌人的光球。 光球在接近目标时会分裂成无数光弹攻击敌人。
description.en: Unleashes a sphere of light that slowly tracks down an enemy. As it nears its target, it splits into countless light bullets that strike all at once.

description.zh: 默世鹿的专用技能。 跃向空中，凝聚巨大的能量然后投向地面。 煌煌天光，涤净尘世。
description.en: Hartalis' exclusive skill. Leaps high into the air, condensing immense energy into a descending sphere of light. When it strikes the ground, it purifies all on the ground below.

description.zh: 墨罗娜的专用技能。 向斜前方跃起，投掷黑色锋利的羽刃进行攻击。
description.en: Solenne's exclusive skill. Jumps diagonally and throws sharp black feathers at enemies.

description.zh: 双心岩傀的专用技能。 从手臂发射草属性能量弹。 能量弹落地后会化为根须，紧追敌人，并从其脚下破土贯穿。
description.en: Dualiths exclusive skill. Fires a Grass-elemental energy projectile from its arm. Upon impact, the blast transforms into persistent roots that track and pierce the enemy from below.

description.zh: 双心岩傀及亚种的专用技能。 将左臂从本体分离，横扫敌人。 随后再射出右臂。
description.en: Dualiths exclusive skill. Detaches its left arm to sweep enemies, then launches its right arm.

description.zh: 奥沧鲸的专用技能。 在敌人周围生成漩涡。 将敌人卷入并不断向中心收缩， 最终爆裂，掀起水柱。
description.en: Panthalus's exclusive skill. Creates a vortex around the enemy. The vortex pulls targets toward its center while shrinking, ending in a high-pressure water pillar explosion.

description.zh: 奥沧鲸的专用技能。 发射大量追踪泡泡。 泡泡着地后会停留在原地。 触碰或数秒后爆裂，对周围造成伤害。
description.en: Panthalus's exclusive skill. Fires a large cluster of homing bubbles that remain in place upon landing. Bubbles burst and deal damage upon contact or after several seconds.

description.zh: 奥沧鲸的专用技能。 腾空而起，召唤多个巨型龙卷风。 龙卷风会缓慢追踪敌人。
description.en: Panthalus's exclusive skill. Soars into the sky and generates multiple massive tornadoes that slowly track enemies.

description.zh: 奥沧鲸的专用技能。 利用全身猛然撞击敌人，掀起波浪。
description.en: Panthalus's exclusive skill. Slams the body into the enemy, generating a massive wave on impact.

description.zh: 奥沧鲸的专用技能。 潜入水中，片刻后破水而出。 借鲸跃之势，在周围掀起扩散的波纹。
description.en: Panthalus's exclusive skill. Dives underwater and leaps out after a short delay. The momentum of the leap creates ripples that damage the surrounding area.

description.zh: 奥沧鲸的专用技能。 释放锋利的水刃，对敌人进行攻击。
description.en: Panthalus's exclusive skill. Launches sharp water blades at enemies.

description.zh: 电针妖的专用技能。 通过超导快速缩短和敌人的距离， 狠狠的用钳子使出上勾拳。
description.en: ScorpionMan_Erectric's exclusive skill. Uses superconductivity to closes the distance to the enemy at high speed, then swings its pincers upward with full force.

description.zh: 日耀驹的专用技能。 以华丽步伐戏耍敌人， 同时用锐利的角挥出斩击。
description.en: Starryon Primo's exclusive skill. Confuses enemies with an elegant stride and launches slashing attack with its sharp horn.

description.zh: 日耀驹的专用技能。 周身缠绕炽烈火焰，朝敌人冲锋。
description.en: Starryon Primo's exclusive skill. Cloaks the body in radiant flames and charges toward the enemy.

description.zh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。
description.en: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

description.zh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。
description.en: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

description.zh: 凛光犬的专用技能。 在前方连续不断生成冰柱， 并在冰柱之间高速突进。
description.en: Rayhound Cryst's exclusive skill. Generates ice pillars ahead and charges forward at high speed through the gaps between them.

description.zh: 凌角马的专用技能。 在自己的周围凝聚冰柱， 同时猛力冲向敌人。
description.en: Univolt Cryst's exclusive skill. Generates ice pillars around itself while charging toward enemies.

description.zh: 奥沧鲸的专用技能。 在敌人周围生成大量泡泡，将其团团包围并发动攻击。
description.en: Panthalus's exclusive skill. Generates a multitude of bubbles around the enemy to surround and attack them.

description.zh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。
description.en: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

description.zh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。
description.en: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

description.zh: 以自身为中心掀起巨大的风暴漩涡， 发动强力攻击。
description.en: Summons a massive wind vortex around itself and unleashes a powerful attack.

description.zh: 遁地鼠的专用技能。 潜入地下，从脚下猛然窜出突袭敌人。
description.en: Fuddler's exclusive skill. Burrows underground and bursts out from beneath enemies.

description.zh: 宗铭丸的专用技能。 全速奔跑的同时，用口中衔着的木棒斩击敌人。 连续施展2段攻击。
description.en: Pupperai's exclusive skill. Charges at full speed, delivering two consecutive slashes with the wooden stick held in its mouth.

description.zh: 梅杜娜的专用技能。 头部的蛇会吐出呈抛物线飞行的毒液球。 毒液球落地便会化为沼泽，令接触沼泽者陷入中毒状态。
description.en: Venusa's exclusive skill. The snakes on her head spit toxic globs in a wide arc. The poisonous pool left at the impact point inflicts Poison on anyone who touches it.

description.zh: 缚乃伊的专用技能。 从手中伸长绷带，对敌人进行连续攻击。
description.en: Gildra's exclusive skill. Extends bandages from its hands to deliver a series of attacks.

description.zh: 拉比耶尔的专用技能。 制造2道幻影迷惑敌人， 本体则从丝绸礼帽中放出炎鸟进行攻击。
description.en: Dupin's exclusive skill. Creates two illusions to distract enemies, then launches fire birds from its top hat.

description.zh: 重岩龟的专用技能。 高高跃起至空中， 随即以压倒性的重量将敌人压垮。
力士獒的专用技能。 高高抡起右后腿重踏地面，释放冲击波， 对前方扇形范围造成攻击。
description.en: Bulldosu's exclusive skill. Raises its right hind leg high and stomps the ground, creating a shockwave that strikes enemies in a fan-shaped area ahead.

description.zh: 磐峰兽的专用技能。 以角刨开地面并顺势上挑， 朝敌人飞射岩石弹。
description.en: Pierdon's exclusive skill. Rakes the ground with its horn, then hurls a rock projectile at enemies.

description.zh: 寒峰兽的专用技能。 以角刨开地面并顺势上挑， 朝敌人飞射雪块。
description.en: Pierdon Cryst's exclusive skill. Rakes the ground with its horn, then hurls a snow chunk at enemies.

description.zh: 快速地向敌人飞扑，咬住敌人进行攻击。
description.en: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

description.zh: 快速连续向敌人进行啃咬攻击。
description.en: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

description.zh: 妖焰灯的专用技能。 高举提灯，召唤出多个执念深重的怨灵， 紧追敌人不放。
description.en: Loomen's exclusive skill. Raises a lantern and summons multiple spirits that relentlessly pursue enemies.

description.zh: 霄龙的专用技能。 周身缠绕水流，笔直地向前猛冲。
description.en: Shaolong's exclusive skill. Cloaks the body in water and charges straight forward.

description.zh: 霄龙的专用技能。 喷吐龙属性烈焰横扫四方， 将周围尽数化为焦土。
description.en: Shaolong's exclusive skill. Breathes Dragon-elemental flames in a sweeping motion, scorching the surrounding area.

description.zh: 霄龙的专用技能。 召唤直冲天际的巨大漩涡。 吞噬周围的敌人，将其一网打尽。
description.en: Shaolong's exclusive skill. Summons a massive vortex reaching into the heavens. The vortex draws in and eliminates all surrounding enemies at once.

description.zh: 大红呱的专用技能。 先轻柔地浮空，再以利爪重重砸向地面。
description.en: Tropicaw's exclusive skill. Leaps lightly into the air, then forcefully slams its sharp claws into the ground.

description.zh: 丹烽的专用技能。 大幅回旋身体投掷出背后的炎盘。 炎盘将会以圆弧轨道状飞行。
description.en: Knocklem Ignis's exclusive skill. Takes a big swing and throws the flaming ring from its back. The ring flies in a circular trajectory.

description.zh: 川霜龙的专用技能。 从口中喷吐冻结光线，使大地结冰。 冻结的地面会形成霜层， 冻结碰到的敌人并对其造成伤害。
description.en: Moldron Cryst's exclusive skill. Fires a freezing beam from the mouth that coats the ground in ice. Frozen ground forms frost pools that freeze and damage enemies on contact.

description.zh: 川霜龙的专用技能。 从口中吐出冰块进行攻击。 落地后会使地面冻结，并形成霜层， 冻结碰到的敌人并对其造成伤害。
description.en: Moldron Cryst's exclusive skill. Spits a chunk of ice from its mouth. The impact creates frost pools that freeze and damage enemies on contact.

description.zh: 净岩龟的专用技能。 高高跃起至空中，将敌人压垮。 随后扩散光芒，以光柱进行追击。
咒心岩傀的专用技能。 从手臂发射暗属性能量弹。 能量弹落地后会化为根须，紧追敌人，并从其脚下破土贯穿。
description.en: Dualith Nocts exclusive skill. Fires a Dark-elemental energy projectile from its arm. Upon impact, the blast transforms into persistent roots that track and pierce the enemy from below.

partnerSkills.description: 若它在队伍中，攻击陷入中毒状态的敌人时，会使该敌人的攻击力降低40%。（不可叠加）

partnerSkills.name: 领袖翻车鱼
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在水上移动。 若它在队伍中，会更容易钓上高潜力帕鲁。（不可叠加） 科技65

partnerSkills.name: 电光翻车鱼

partnerSkills.name: 自由翼龙
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 灵曦龙的攻击力和移动速度，会随着队伍中其他龙属性或暗属性帕鲁的数量提升，每只增加2%。 科技68

partnerSkills.name: 愤怒翼龙
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 狱熙龙的攻击力和移动速度，会随着队伍中其他龙属性或火属性帕鲁的数量提升，每只增加2%。 科技76

partnerSkills.name: 电动按摩式抱窝
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 若它在据点里，帕鲁蛋的孵化速度加快20%。（不可叠加） 科技66

partnerSkills.name: 花之舞
partnerSkills.description: 若它在队伍中，玩家进行翻滚或滑步动作时，无敌时间延长15%。（不可叠加）

partnerSkills.name: 未来之炎
partnerSkills.description: 若它在队伍中，玩家的攻击击中点燃状态的敌人时，会使敌人爆炸，额外造成相当于玩家攻击力40%的伤害。（不可叠加）

partnerSkills.name: 清灿迷雾
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上移动。 若它在队伍中，会为玩家的攻击附加2点浸湿异常状态值。（不可叠加） 科技72

partnerSkills.name: 拉比拉比魔术秀
partnerSkills.description: 若它在队伍中，当玩家的生命值低于50%时，拉比耶尔会在玩家周边掀起爆炸冲击波（火属性 / 威力: 100 / 点燃积蓄值: 777）。）。 此外，玩家的生命值低于50%期间，玩家的攻击力提升30%。（不可叠加）

partnerSkills.name: 潜影怪鸟
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 若它在队伍中，玩家和帕鲁对黑暗状态的敌人造成的伤害将提升50%。（不可叠加） 科技72

partnerSkills.name: 灵蛇之智
partnerSkills.description: 若它在队伍中，会为玩家的攻击附加2点黑暗异常状态值。（不可叠加）

partnerSkills.name: 魅惑孢子
partnerSkills.description: 若它在据点里，其他据点帕鲁的制药工作适应性等级+1。（不可叠加）

partnerSkills.name: 提灯附魔
partnerSkills.description: 若它在队伍中，玩家射箭命中目标时会爆炸，额外造成相当于玩家攻击力15%的伤害。（不可叠加）

partnerSkills.name: 隐藏的暗能量
partnerSkills.description: 若它在队伍中，暗属性帕鲁的防御力提升15%。（不可叠加）

partnerSkills.name: 孤染公主
partnerSkills.description: 若它在队伍中，并且所有队伍帕鲁的种类都不同时，玩家的攻击力会提升30%。（不可叠加）

partnerSkills.name: 大显身手
partnerSkills.description: 若它在队伍中，会为玩家的攻击附加2点点燃异常状态值。（不可叠加）

partnerSkills.name: 不破要塞龙
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上移动。 若它在队伍中，玩家和帕鲁受到的爆炸攻击伤害减轻60%，并且不会陷入眩晕状态。（不可叠加） 科技79

partnerSkills.name: 黄色重型战车

partnerSkills.description: 发动后便能通过女王的疗愈能力，为玩家和队伍内的帕鲁恢复80%的生命值。

partnerSkills.name: 幽光女神
partnerSkills.description: 发动后便能通过女王的疗愈能力，为玩家和队伍内的帕鲁恢复85%的生命值。

partnerSkills.name: 凶猛的迅雷龙
partnerSkills.description: 若它在队伍中，子弹击中敌人时，一同并肩作战的帕鲁的攻击力与防御力会提升1%。 该效果最多可累积30层，持续5秒。（不可叠加）

partnerSkills.name: 灼热捕食者
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 若它在队伍中，击倒冰属性帕鲁时获得的掉落道具增加40%。（不可叠加） 科技60

partnerSkills.name: 潮汐捕食者
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 若它在队伍中，击倒火属性帕鲁时获得的掉落道具增加40%。（不可叠加） 科技60

partnerSkills.name: 基因改造
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 骑乘期间的暗属性攻击将提升15%。 且飞行时移动速度会提升。 科技47

partnerSkills.name: 晦暗辉光
partnerSkills.description: 可坐在它背后的月亮在空中飞行。 骑乘期间的无属性和暗属性攻击将强化15%。 科技53

partnerSkills.name: 暴雪冲击
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上移动。 骑乘期间它还能挥下冰属性的大锤进行攻击。 科技73

partnerSkills.name: 苍天统治者
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 霄龙的攻击力，会随着队伍中其他龙属性帕鲁的数量提升，每只增加4%。 科技77

partnerSkills.name: 孢子守卫
partnerSkills.description: 若它在队伍中，玩家的攻击击中缠绕状态的敌人时，会使敌人爆炸，额外造成相当于玩家攻击力40%的伤害。（不可叠加） 另外，能让玩家与帕鲁不受世界树的爆炸孢子影响。

partnerSkills.name: 迷雾守卫
partnerSkills.description: 发动后，为玩家的攻击附加2点中毒异常状态值。（不可叠加） 若它在队伍中，玩家和帕鲁不会陷入中毒状态，并且不受世界树区域的毒气影响。

partnerSkills.name: 梦魇之瞳
partnerSkills.description: 发动后会以噩梦射线攻击锁定的目标敌人。 此帕鲁使用的噩梦射线的威力将提升至1.1倍。

partnerSkills.name: 噩梦凝视
partnerSkills.description: 发动后会以噩梦绽放攻击锁定的目标敌人。 此帕鲁使用的噩梦绽放的威力将提升至1.1倍。

partnerSkills.name: 陨星之翼
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 若它在队伍中，持有武器的帕鲁的伙伴技能伤害将提升20%。（不可叠加） 科技66

partnerSkills.name: 庇佑圣盾
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上移动。 骑乘期间可生成护盾，抵御一切攻击。 此外，骑乘期间可进行3段跳跃。 科技70

partnerSkills.name: 天翔圣骑士

partnerSkills.name: 深渊黑骑士

partnerSkills.name: 冰天马
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 骑乘期间玩家的攻击会转变为冰属性，攻击力提升10%，且攻击会附加2点冻结异常状态值。 科技62

partnerSkills.name: 黑天马
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 骑乘期间玩家的攻击会转变为暗属性，攻击力提升10%，且攻击会附加2点黑暗异常状态值。 科技62

partnerSkills.name: 大海的霸主
partnerSkills.description: 与玩家并肩作战时，它会配合玩家的攻击用水属性的长枪进行追击。 可骑在它的背上在水上移动。 骑乘期间可在水面高高跃起。 科技64

partnerSkills.name: 地毯式轰炸
partnerSkills.description: 可骑在它的背上在空中飞行。 骑乘期间它还能用导弹发射器连续攻击。 科技79

partnerSkills.name: 残响守护者

这个帕鲁擅长的事情仍在调查中。
